prompt: Create a highly detailed vertical anime illustration of a cheerful kunoichi-inspired girl named Sakura Kunoichi sitting on a stone ledge during cherry blossom season at sunset. She has extremely long twin-tail pink hair flowing dramatically across the scene, decorated with two large matching floral hair ornaments, dangling gold charms, ribbons, and tiny blossoms. Her expression is joyful and cute: one eye winking, one bright pink eye open, mouth open in a smile, soft blush, glossy lips, and a playful pose. She wears an ornate fantasy ninja-kimono outfit in pink, white, deep purple, and gold: sleeveless kimono bodice with floral sakura patterns, dark crisscross waist armor, layered translucent sleeves, thigh-high stockings with cherry blossom motifs, decorative cords, tassels, flower brooches, and gold jewelry. She is holding exactly two dango items: in her raised left hand, one skewer with three round dumplings colored green, white, and pink; in her right hand, one small black plate containing exactly four dumplings colored pink, white, green, and brown. The background shows a romantic Japanese shrine or temple town with tiled rooftops, a glowing paper lantern on the right, distant traditional buildings on the left, and branches loaded with pink cherry blossoms framing the top. The sky is warm golden-pink twilight with sun flare, soft clouds, and drifting petals. Use a polished gpt-image-2 anime art style with luminous rim light, sparkling highlights, intricate fabric patterns, delicate linework, cinematic depth of field, abundant sakura petals, dreamy fantasy atmosphere, and high-resolution vertical composition. Add a small white watermark text Pollo.ai in the top-right corner. Avoid extra characters, avoid modern objects, and keep the focus on the single seated kunoichi girl and the two dango props.
